message:
fix(build): Use explicit relative paths for Windows compatibility

Bun on Windows requires the ./ prefix for script paths. Without it,
`bun run scripts/build.ts` fails with "Script not found" on Windows.

Changes:
- package.json: Add ./ prefix to all scripts/build.ts references
- scripts/build.ts: Add ./ prefix to inline-wasm-compute.ts invocation

This fixes the Windows CI build failure.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -14,12 +14,12 @@
     "dev": "bun run packages/tui/src/index.tsx",
     "build:db": "bun run packages/data-pipeline/src/build-db.ts",
     "build:tropism": "bun run packages/data-pipeline/src/tropism-build.ts",
-    "build": "bun run scripts/build.ts",
-    "build:mac-arm64": "bun run scripts/build.ts --target=mac-arm64",
-    "build:mac-x64": "bun run scripts/build.ts --target=mac-x64",
-    "build:linux-x64": "bun run scripts/build.ts --target=linux-x64",
-    "build:linux-arm64": "bun run scripts/build.ts --target=linux-arm64",
-    "build:windows-x64": "bun run scripts/build.ts --target=windows-x64",
+    "build": "bun run ./scripts/build.ts",
+    "build:mac-arm64": "bun run ./scripts/build.ts --target=mac-arm64",
+    "build:mac-x64": "bun run ./scripts/build.ts --target=mac-x64",
+    "build:linux-x64": "bun run ./scripts/build.ts --target=linux-x64",
+    "build:linux-arm64": "bun run ./scripts/build.ts --target=linux-arm64",
+    "build:windows-x64": "bun run ./scripts/build.ts --target=windows-x64",
     "build:all": "bun run build:mac-arm64 && bun run build:mac-x64 && bun run build:linux-x64 && bun run build:linux-arm64 && bun run build:windows-x64",
     "dev:web": "bun run --cwd packages/web dev",
     "build:web": "bun run --cwd packages/web build",
